info.name: Akaunting API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Akaunting Laravel backend.

**Authentication:**
- POST /api/login to get a Bearer token
- Use the token in the Authorization header for all other requests
- Pass company context via X-Company header or ?company_id= query param

**Base URL:** {{base_url}} (default: http://localhost:8000/api)

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for login, logout, and profile.

request.description:
Authenticate and receive a Sanctum Bearer token.

The token is automatically saved to the `auth_token` collection variable.

response.name: Login - Invalid Credentials

request.description: Health check - returns pong if API is up.

{
    "type": "invoice",

            "name": "Web Development",
            "quantity": 5,
            "price": 50.00,
            "description": "Frontend development hours"
        }
    ],
    "notes": "Payment due within 30 days"
}

request.description: Mark a document (typically a bill) as received.
